raw_consumer_statement:
on XXXX XX/XX/year> I noticed a payment on my credit card of {$130.00}, I tried to make dispute with citi bank but their system won't allow me to do that till the payment become posted and that took several days!!!! after the payment posted I called and make the dispute and they send me another card and closed the old one the citi bank should have acted faster than than and refund my money instead of buying more time and refuse my dispute without explaining why they didn't refund my money or what should I do? 
I don't know what to do with them it's not fair to loss money over banks negligence and low performance when it comes to customer card, my card number was XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX please help me and thank you
